title: Identity Preserved iPhone Retail Live Capture Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Identity Preserved iPhone Retail Live Capture Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image hyper-realistic iPhone retail-store portrait transformation using uploaded reference portrait before iPhone retail-store live-capture transformation, preserving same adult woman from the uploaded reference while staging a phone-across-face live-capture portrait. Subject: same adult woman from the uploaded reference keeps the exact uploaded identity, natural facial structure, age cues, and hair character while holds an iPhone horizontally across her eyes and forehead inside the retail environment. Scene: modern phone retail store with a glass display case and reflective wall creates a realistic consumer-electronics store atmosphere with clean glass, reflective surfaces, display lighting, and subtle depth behind the subject. Composition: Preserve the reference identity while using a slightly elevated front-facing angle; the phone spans horizontally across the upper face, screen facing camera, with a live capture of her own face aligned on the phone screen visible as the central visual mechanism. Signature Elements: Preserved identity preserved iphone retail live capture portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Hyper-realistic editorial smartphone portrait with retail snapshot realism, natural skin texture, crisp reflections, authentic phone-screen glow, shallow depth of field, and polished social-photo finish. Color Palette: Neutral retail whites, cool glass reflections, natural skin tones, black phone hardware, soft metallic highlights, and restrained commercial-store color accents. Lighting: Bright indoor retail lighting mixed with phone-screen glow, reflective display highlights, soft facial fill, and sharp but natural front-facing exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Scene: modern phone retail store with a glass display case and reflective wall creates a realistic consumer-electronics store atmosphere with clean glass, reflective surfaces, display lighting, and subtle depth behind the subject. Composition: Preserve the reference identity while using a slightly elevated front-facing angle; the phone spans horizontally across the upper face, screen facing camera, with a live capture of her own face aligned on the phone screen visible as the central visual mechanism. Signature Elements: Preserved identity preserved iphone retail live capture portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Hyper-realistic editorial smartphone portrait with retail snapshot realism, natural skin texture, crisp reflections, authentic phone-screen glow, shallow depth of field, and polished social-photo finish. Color Palette: Neutral retail whites, cool glass reflections, natural skin tones, black phone hardware, soft metallic highlights, and restrained commercial-store color accents. Lighting: Bright indoor retail lighting mixed with phone-screen glow, reflective display highlights, soft facial fill, and sharp but natural front-facing exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
